full_text:
Received a small, hard piece of tumor.

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 8.9 mL DMEM/F12+++, 1 mL C&H, and 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 2 mL for 5 min + 10 mL DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++.

The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 1x 1.415 E6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 1x 0.6915 E6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 1.40 | 0.698
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 0.858 | 0.324
 | viability [%] | 61.1 | 46.5
 | size [µm] | 8.7 | 7.7
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 1.43 | 0.686
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 0.772 | 0.283
 | viability [%] | 54.0 | 41.3
 | size [µm] | 7.8 | 8.6
Average | [cells/ml] | 1.415 E6 | 0.6915 E6
 | total [cells] | 1.415 E6 in 1 ml | 0.6915 E6 in 1 ml
 | viability [%] | 57.55 | 43.9
